title: Fiskars Hand Shovel with extra high edge, Length: 29.1 cm, Synthetic resin, Black/Orange, 1071303
features: Practical hand shovel for transferring soil and substrate from the bag to the flower pot
No tipping of the shovel when laying down thanks to the flat underside, no spilling of soil thanks to high side edges
Made of lightweight synthetic resin with 20 % recycled plastic, practical hanging hole for easy storage
Fiskars Urban Plant Care tools: for lush, green oases in living rooms and on terraces or balconies
Contents: 1x Fiskars Hand Shovel, Length: 29.1 cm, Weight: 110 g, Material: Synthetic resin, Colour: Black/Orange, 1071303
description: From the manufacturer Hand shovel For decanting soil and substrate The hand scoop from the Urban Plant Care series by Fiskars is ideal for transferring soil and substrate from the bag to the flower pot - perfect for indoor and balcony plants. Thanks to its flat underside, the shovel won't tip over when you lay it flat. The high side edges also prevent soil from being spilt when moving. The hand shovel is made of lightweight synthetic resin containing 20 % recycled plastic. Previous page For decanting soil and substrate The Fiskars hand shovel is perfect for transferring soil and substrate from the bag to the flower pot. Flat underside and high side edges The flat underside allows the bucket to lie upright without tipping over. The high side edges also prevent soil from spilling. Lightweight synthetic resin Made of durable, lightweight synthetic resin with 20 % recycled plastic. Fiskars Urban Plant Care The Fiskars Urban Plant Care range offers everything you need for gardening in a small space: planting mat, planting shovel with brush, hand shovel, watering can, plant sprayer and storage box. Quality since 1649 Fiskars stands for quality and innovation since 1649. Our products impress with their quality, functionality, durability, and design.
